title: teline osmarensis
intro: Teline osmarensis, also known as Spanish broom, is a flowering legume native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its thorny shrub-like appearance and clusters of small, yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Teline osmarensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Teline osmarensis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies for its antiseptic and antispasmodic properties.
